answers.answer: D) logger.error({ err: error, correlationId: req.correlationId }, "Failed to process request"); (using pino with correlation ID). Reason: This correctly applies BOTH corrections: (1) uses pino logger instead of console.log, AND (2) includes correlation ID. Options A and C use console.log (wrong). Option B uses pino but missing correlation ID. Only D applies both corrections.

CURRENT SCHEMA (Version 8):
```json
{
  "id": "string (UUID)",
  "first_name": "string",
  "last_name": "string",
  "full_name": "string (computed: first_name + ' ' + last_name)",
  "role": "enum: admin | editor | viewer",
  "avatar_url": "string (URL)",
  "preferences": {
    "theme": "string",
    "language": "string"
  },
  "notifications_enabled": "boolean (top-level)",
  "email": "string | null (only if requester is admin or own profile)",
  "last_login_at": "ISO 8601 timestamp",
  "created_at": "ISO 8601 timestamp",
  "status": "enum: active | suspended | deactivated"
}
```

CHANGELOG:

| Version | Changes |
|---------|---------|
| v1 | Initial: id, name, email, created_at |
| v2 | +role (admin/editor/viewer), rename name->display_name |
| v3 | Split display_name->first_name+last_name, +full_name (computed) |
| v4 | +avatar_url, +preferences {theme, language, notifications_enabled} |
| v5 | email->nullable (only for admin/self), add authorization logic |
| v6 | +last_login_at, created_at: ISO->Unix timestamp |
| v7 | REVERT: created_at Unix->ISO string (undo v6 change) |
| v8 | +status (active/suspended/deactivated), move notifications_enabled from preferences to top-level |

KEY CHANGES SUMMARY:
- Fields added: role, first_name, last_name, full_name, avatar_url, preferences, notifications_enabled, last_login_at, status
- Fields removed: name (renamed), email (made conditional), notifications_enabled (moved)
- Type changes: created_at ISO->Unix->ISO (v6 then reverted v7), notifications_enabled nested->top-level (v8)
- Access control: email field now requires authorization
